description: Tiger Girl (TIGER) is the ATC-20 memecoin about a brave and stylish girl who enjoys her snow-forest land with a Chinese Northeast Tiger — reflecting beauty, courage, adventure and joyfulness. Exclusively launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — TIGER gives all holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability throughout the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Tiger Girl
